name: Sesame Chicken Fingers
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Chicken Breast, skinned, boned, and sliced into 2x1/2 inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. No-cholesterol sesame seeds replace traditional batter for these crunchy appetizers.
2. Make about 20 pieces.
3. In a small bowl, blend mustard and honey for the sauce. Set aside.
4. In a shallow pan, combine sesame seeds and Parmesan cheese; roll chicken pieces in the mixture.
5. Heat olive oil in an oven-safe heavy-bottomed nonstick skillet or sauté pan until just below smoking point.
6. Add chicken strips and brown on both sides over medium heat. Do not scorch.
7. Place chicken strips on a baking sheet and bake in a preheated 425°F (220°C) oven for 8-10 minutes, or until cooked through.
8. To serve, arrange lettuce leaves and chicken strips on individual plates. Alternatively, compose a serving platter.
9. Garnish with orange rind.
10. Serve with honey mustard sauce.
